display_name: GitHub Actions Supply Chain — Compromised Actions Registry
procedure_steps: BEFORE adding or using any GitHub Action, check the advisory registry for known compromised actions.
If the action+version matches a compromised entry, BLOCK and warn the agent.
ALWAYS pin GitHub Actions to a full commit SHA, never a mutable tag (v1, latest, etc.).
If a workflow file references a compromised action, flag it immediately.
restrictions: NEVER use a compromised GitHub Action version
ALWAYS pin actions to commit SHA in workflow files
If a compromised action is found in an existing workflow, alert the operator immediately
notes: Compromised GitHub Actions registry. Advisory file at ~/.claude/hooks/github-actions-advisories.json.
